prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel) for the **M838T 3.8L twin-turbo V8**, pushing boost from 12 psi (stock) to 22 psi with a custom **Motec M150 ECU** map, targeting 850whp on **93 octane** with **ID1000 injectors** and a **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** to prevent fuel starvation under lateral G-forces

Install **Penske 8760 3-way adjustable coilovers** with **Eibach ERS race springs (1200 lb/in front, 1400 lb/in rear)** and **MCS remote reservoir dampers**, paired with **AP Racing CP8376-1000 6-piston front/4-piston rear big brake kit** with **380mm CCM-R discs** for track-optimized stopping power

Replace the stock **GKN limited-slip differential** with a **Wavetrac ATB differential (M838T-specific housing)** and upgrade the **Graziano transaxle** with **PPG straight-cut gears (1st: 2.54, 2nd: 1.86, 3rd: 1.47)** and a **Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch** for 0-60 mph in 2.4s and sub-10s 1/4-mile times
estetica: Fit a **Vorsteiner V-FF102 carbon fiber widebody kit** (12C-specific, +50mm front/+70mm rear) with **custom Vorsteiner GT-spec canards** and a **Rocket Bunny V3 rear diffuser** for aggressive aero balance (targeting -150kg downforce at 150 mph)

Replace the stock **dihedral doors** with **Novitec McLaren 12C carbon fiber scissor doors** (weight reduction: -12kg) and install **VMR V710 19x10.5 ET35 front / 20x12.5 ET45 rear wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35 R19 front, 325/30 R20 rear)**

Apply a **3M Matte Military Green (212)** full-body vinyl wrap with **custom Akrapović titanium exhaust tips (dual 100mm outlets)** and **LED taillight delete (Lux H8 V4 LEDs)** for a stealth-track aesthetic, paired with a **Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM-spec louvered)**
